mission.title: kubescape: chore: update docs build.ps1
mission.description:
## Overview

As mentioned in the issue, this PR replaces `build.bat` with `build.ps1`

## Additional Information

This is a continuation PR of https://github.com/kubescape/kubescape/pull/1279 and these doc changes were mentioned there

## Related issues/PRs:

Resolved #1298 

## Checklist before requesting a review

- [x] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [x] I have commented on my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [x] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [x] If it is a core feature, I have added thorough tests.
- [x] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes

resolution.summary:
@HollowMan6 amazing!

I don't work that often with windows tooling, could you elaborate a bit as to exactly what the problem was and how you were able to fix it and how you got the intuition of the fix?

Even looking at the files changed, I can't seem to figure out exactly what was the problem in the script?

Thanks!
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
